payload.message: Daily routine. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_morning_briefing, then yahoo_auto_lineup. Follow your autonomy level for all action items. Report actions taken and items awaiting approval in 2-3 sentences.
Pre-lock check. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_game_day_manager. Follow your autonomy level for any lineup changes or streaming adds. Report findings.

New matchup week. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_league_landscape for standings context, then yahoo_matchup_strategy for this week's opponent. Report: opponent, category targets/concedes, top recommended actions.
Waiver deadline approaching. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_waiver_deadline_prep. Follow your autonomy level for whether to submit claims. Report recommendations and any actions taken.
Midweek streaming check. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_streaming. Follow your autonomy level for whether to execute streaming adds. Report findings.
Weekend roster audit. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_roster_health_check. Follow your autonomy level for any issues found. Report issues and actions taken.
End of week. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_weekly_digest. Report the week's result, key performers, standings movement, and notable roster moves. Keep the narrative concise.

Monthly check-in. Call yahoo_league_context first, then yahoo_season_checkpoint. Report: strategic assessment, category trajectory, trade recommendations, and playoff outlook. Highlight any categories trending the wrong direction.
